summary: Verified the side-by-side layout change on Pom Jar at 1280x900. Jar (x=155, w=288 -> right edge 443) and Today panel (x=603) are side by side with vertical overlap; Task Drawer (y=821) is positioned below both (jar bottom=680, today bottom=697) and spans ~full container width (w=1112 within 1280 viewport). All regression scenarios pass: adding a Today task, completing it increments jar-progress 0/400 -> 1/400 and removes the row; drawer toggle expands/collapses; localStorage persistence survives reload.
seed_data_creation: None; localStorage cleared during test then TEST_reg1 / TEST_persist added and left in place
context_for_next_testing_agent: Layout verified via bounding boxes at 1280x900. Jar wrapper -> right column (Add task + Today) side-by-side under md breakpoint; TaskDrawer full-width below. Use [data-testid=task-name-input] + button:has-text('Add task') to add tasks (no plain text inputs). Complete uses [data-testid^=complete-task-].
rca of the issue: N/A - layout change verified working as intended
